components.name: Project scaffolding (package.json, tsconfig.json, npm install)
components.description: Initialize Vite React+TypeScript project. Set strict:true in tsconfig. Install all runtime and dev dependencies. Verify TypeScript compiles with zero errors.

components.name: TypeScript type definitions (src/types/)
components.description: Write all 4 type files: algorithm.ts (QuestionState, QuestionRecord, ExposureRecord), session.ts (SessionRecord), store.ts (AppStore), content.ts (Question, Skill). These are the contracts all subsequent tasks reference — must be complete before any logic is written.

components.name: PWA assets (icons, apple-touch-icon)
components.description: Create public/icons/icon-192.png, icon-512.png, and apple-touch-icon.png. Required for vite-plugin-pwa manifest and iOS home screen install. Can be placeholder icons during development.

components.name: Design system CSS (src/styles/globals.css)
components.description: Implement all CSS custom properties from zzz/design-system/style-template.md: color tokens, typography scale, spacing tokens, gradient presets. Run frontend-design skill first. This file must exist before any component styling.

components.name: mulberry32 PRNG utility (src/lib/prng.ts)
components.description: Implement mulberry32 LCG, seedFromSessionId(), and seededShuffle<T>(). Pure functions, zero dependencies. Exact implementation specified in blueprint section 7. Required before sessionBuilder can be written.

components.name: Device ID utility (src/lib/deviceId.ts)
components.description: Implement resolveDeviceId() with localStorage → cookie → crypto.randomUUID() fallback chain. Implement getCookie/setCookie with 7-year SameSite=Strict. Pure DOM API, no npm dep.

components.name: Content data files (src/data/questions.ts, skills.ts)
components.description: Copy zzz/questions.js → src/data/questions.ts with typed export (Question[]). Copy zzz/skills.js → src/data/skills.ts with typed export (Skill[]). Add TypeScript types and verify import works. DO NOT modify content — user-verified.

components.name: Vite config + PWA setup (vite.config.ts + index.html iOS meta tags)
components.description: Write vite.config.ts with @vitejs/plugin-react and VitePWA config: full manifest (name, icons, display, theme_color), includeAssets, generateSW mode. Add iOS meta tags to index.html: apple-mobile-web-app-capable, status-bar-style, title, apple-touch-icon link.

components.name: Infrastructure provisioning (Upstash Redis + Vercel project + env vars)
components.description: FIRST EXECUTION TASK. Test Upstash MCP connectivity. Provision Redis database via MCP (or Vercel KV fallback). Create Vercel project via CLI. Set UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN via 'vercel env add'. Verify connectivity before writing any code that uses these vars.

components.name: 5-state algorithm (src/lib/algorithm.ts)
components.description: Implement: isFastTap(), hasReversalInWindow(), applyAnswer(), isMaintenanceDue(). Pure functions, no side effects. All state transitions per blueprint section 4 and section 7. TypeScript strict with exhaustive switch on QuestionState union.

components.name: Session builder (src/lib/sessionBuilder.ts)
components.description: Implement buildSessionQueue(questions, sessionCount, allQuestions): string[]. Uses isMaintenanceDue() from algorithm.ts, mulberry32 + seededShuffle from prng.ts. Tier ordering: Active → interleaved Near-Mastery → maintenance-due. Returns ordered array of question IDs.

components.name: Analytics computations (src/lib/analytics.ts)
components.description: Implement computeTopicStats(questions, allQuestions): TopicStat[] and computeEstimatedScore(topicStats): number. Pure functions. Formula: masteryPercent = (mastered + near_mastery*0.5) / count * 100. Score = weighted average.

components.name: Zustand store (src/store/useStore.ts)
components.description: Implement full Zustand store with persist middleware. Key: 'fap_store', version: 1, migrate function template. All AppStore fields + actions per blueprint section 8. Verify localStorage rehydration on page reload.

components.name: /api/sync serverless function (api/sync.ts)
components.description: Implement GET and POST handlers for Vercel serverless function. GET: read from Upstash Redis by deviceId. POST: write JSON string to Redis. Validate deviceId is UUID format. Uses UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN env vars.

components.name: useSession hook (src/hooks/useSession.ts)
components.description: Implements session lifecycle: startSession() builds queue via sessionBuilder + creates SessionRecord. nextQuestion() advances index, handles fastTapPending. endSession() increments sessionCount, clears currentSession. Reads/writes Zustand store.

components.name: useSync hook (src/hooks/useSync.ts)
components.description: Implements: autoSync() setInterval (60s, fires when isDirty=true). manualSave() calls POST /api/sync. restoreBackup() calls GET /api/sync. Reads deviceId and questions from store. Calls store.markClean() on success.

components.name: BottomNav component
components.description: 4 fixed nav items: Study | Skills | Progress | Settings. Reads activeTab from store, calls setActiveTab on tap. Touch target ≥44px. Active indicator: gradient underline per design system. Uses CSS custom properties.

components.name: AppShell component
components.description: Root layout. Mounts all 4 tab components with CSS display:none toggling (not unmounting) to preserve state on tab switch. Renders BottomNav fixed at bottom. Wraps app content area with correct padding to avoid BottomNav overlap.

components.name: AnswerOption component
components.description: Single answer button. Props: text, index, selectedIndex|null, correctIndex, onSelect. Visual states: idle / selected-correct / selected-incorrect / revealed-correct. After selection: all options show result state. Uses design system state colors.

components.name: ExplanationPanel component
components.description: Shows after answer selection. Displays explanation text, correct/incorrect result badge, fast-tap warning when applicable. 'Next Question' button calls onNext callback. Slides in from below after answer.

components.name: QuestionCard component
components.description: Displays one question. On mount: records Date.now() as questionDisplayTime in store. Renders question text, topic label, AnswerOption list. On answer: records elapsed time, calls useSession.recordAnswer(isFastTap, correct), shows ExplanationPanel.

components.name: SessionSummary component
components.description: End-of-session screen. Shows: questions answered count, correct%, fast-taps flagged count, state distribution (new/active/near_mastery/mastered). 'Start New Session' button calls useSession.startSession(). Uses Zustand store for stats.

components.name: StudyTab component
components.description: Session orchestrator. On mount: if no currentSession, calls startSession(). If session complete: shows SessionSummary. Else: shows QuestionCard for current question. Reads current question from store queue+index.

components.name: SkillCard component
components.description: Expandable accordion card. Collapsed: skillName + category badge. Expanded: objective, numbered steps, commonErrors list, evaluationCriteria list. Reads skillsExpandedId from store; sets it on expand. Accordion: only one open at a time.

components.name: SkillsTab component
components.description: Renders all 12 skills as SkillCard list. Imports skills from src/data/skills.ts. No filtering or search — plain scrollable list.

components.name: ScoreDisplay component
components.description: Large estimated exam score number (DM Sans 300 weight). 'Ready to test' banner: shows when estimatedScore >= 80 AND all topics >= 75% mastery. Uses computeEstimatedScore() from analytics.ts.

components.name: TopicGrid component
components.description: 11-cell grid. For each topic: short name + masteryPercent%. Color: red (#E54343) < 50%, yellow (#F5A623) 50–80%, green (#2DB55D) > 80%. Calls computeTopicStats(). Uses CSS grid layout.

components.name: WeakTopics component
components.description: Renders top 3 weakest topics by masteryPercent (ascending sort of topicStats). Shows topic name and mastery%. Uses computeTopicStats().

components.name: ProgressTab component
components.description: Container for progress screen. Calls computeTopicStats() and computeEstimatedScore() from analytics.ts using Zustand questions state. Renders ScoreDisplay, TopicGrid, WeakTopics. Re-renders when questions state changes.

components.name: SyncControls component
components.description: Manual Save button: triggers useSync.manualSave(), shows loading spinner, success/error status. Restore button: shows confirmation prompt → useSync.restoreBackup(). Last sync timestamp. Content version display.

components.name: SettingsTab component
components.description: Container for Settings screen. Renders SyncControls. Mounts useSync hook for auto-sync interval (every 60s when isDirty). Displays app version and content version info.

components.name: IOSInstallBanner component
components.description: Detects iOS Safari via: navigator.standalone === false AND /iPad|iPhone|iPod/.test(navigator.userAgent). Renders dismissible banner with 'Tap Share → Add to Home Screen' instruction. On dismiss: store.dismissIOSBanner(). Not shown if iosInstallDismissed or on Android.

components.name: App entry (src/main.tsx + App.tsx)
components.description: main.tsx: Initialize Zustand store (call initializeQuestions with all question IDs, call resolveDeviceId and set in store). App.tsx: Render AppShell + IOSInstallBanner + mount useSync auto-sync. Verify app renders to first question with zero console errors.

components.name: Vercel production deployment
components.description: Run: vite build. Verify dist/ size (< 5MB). Run: vercel deploy --prod. Verify: app loads at production URL, service worker registers, PWA installable, /api/sync responds, offline mode works after first visit.

critical_path.description: Project setup → TypeScript types → Algorithm → Store → Session builder → useSession hook → QuestionCard → StudyTab → AppShell → main.tsx → Deploy. This chain cannot be parallelized. Any delay in algorithm.ts or useSession.ts directly blocks deployment.

parallel_groups.description: Foundation + Infrastructure: Project setup, PWA assets, design system CSS, and infrastructure provisioning can all proceed simultaneously. Infrastructure provisioning (Upstash + Vercel) should start first as it involves external dependencies.
Type definitions (after project setup), Vite PWA config (after project setup + icons), /api/sync function (after project setup + infra). These are independent of each other.
All utility libs + content data + store + sync hook + leaf UI components. Largest parallel batch. Algorithm (comp-010) is critical path; others can run alongside it.
Session builder (needs PRNG + algorithm), analytics, and most UI components that only need types + store + design system.
useSession hook (needs session builder), SkillsTab, all Progress sub-components, SettingsTab.
QuestionCard (needs useSession + leaf components) and ProgressTab (needs analytics + sub-components).
AppShell: assembles all 4 tab components + BottomNav.
App entry: wires store initialization, renders AppShell + IOSInstallBanner.
Production deployment: final gate after full build passes.

risk_points.risk: Highest fan-out: 8 direct dependents. Any type error or interface omission blocks the entire component tree.
risk_points.mitigation: Complete all 4 type files before writing any logic. Review against algorithm specification and all 5 QuestionState values. TypeScript compiler will enforce correctness downstream.

risk_points.risk: Highest implementation complexity. The 5-state machine has subtle conditions (reversal detection, session ID tracking, fast-tap exclusion). An off-by-one in streak logic or missed reversal breaks exam readiness accuracy.
risk_points.mitigation: Write pure functions with explicit inputs/outputs. Test each transition in isolation before integrating with store. Reversal window (last 5 deliberate exposures) is the most complex condition — verify with written test cases.

risk_points.risk: External dependency with unknown auth state. If Upstash MCP is not authenticated, provisioning fails and /api/sync cannot be deployed.
risk_points.mitigation: Run as the FIRST execution task. Test MCP before writing any code. Vercel KV fallback is documented and maintains identical /api/sync code — only env var names differ.

risk_points.risk: Store schema errors cause localStorage corruption on first deploy. Adding fields after v1 without a migration breaks persisted data.
risk_points.mitigation: Define all AppStore fields in types/store.ts before writing useStore.ts. Never add fields to the store without incrementing version and adding a migrate function. Redis restore in Settings provides recovery.

risk_points.risk: useSession hook complexity: session queue management, fast-tap buffering, and state transitions across multiple functions. Bugs here cause questions to repeat incorrectly or mastery to not advance.
risk_points.mitigation: Split into atomic functions: startSession(), recordAnswer(), nextQuestion(), endSession(). Each function has a single responsibility. Test session end (fastTapPending flush) separately.

notes: The critical path runs through the algorithm (comp-010) → session builder → useSession hook → QuestionCard → StudyTab. All UI work for Skills/Progress/Settings can proceed in parallel with the core study loop. Infrastructure (comp-009) should be treated as a parallel Level-0 task but is not on the critical path for the application code.
